dublinCore.dc:title: 116 HR 1078 RH: Respect State Housing Laws Act
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

action.action-desc: Mr. Loudermilk (for himself, Mr. Vicente Gonzalez of Texas, Mr. Norman, Mr. Clyde, Mr. Rutherford, Mr. Barr, Mr. Kustoff, Mr. Mann, Mr. Ogles, Mr. Hudson, Mr. Scott Franklin of Florida, Mr. Womack, Mr. Grothman, Mr. Luttrell, Mr. Timmons, Mr. Biggs of Arizona, Mr. Stauber, and Mr. McCormick) introduced the following bill; which was referred to the Committee on Financial Services

Additional sponsors: Mr. Yakym, Mr. Flood, Ms. De La Cruz, Mr. Edwards, Mrs. Wagner, Mr. Palmer, Mr. Gooden, Mrs. Miller-Meeks, Mr. Fleischmann, Mr. Soto, Mr. Fitzgerald, Mr. Wilson of South Carolina, Mr. Webster of Florida, Mr. Smith of Nebraska, Mr. Fulcher, Mr. Harrigan, Mr. Gill of Texas, Mr. Evans of Colorado, Mr. Johnson of South Dakota, Mr. Strong, Ms. Tenney, Mr. Hern of Oklahoma, Mr. McGuire, Mr. Rouzer, Mrs. Hinson, Mr. Moran, Mr. Lucas, Mr. Self, Mr. Stutzman, Mrs. Biggs of South Carolina, Mr. Goldman of Texas, Mr. Alford, Mr. Williams of Texas, Mr. Moore of North Carolina, Mr. Sessions, Mr. Davidson, Mr. Finstad, Mr. Donalds, Mr. Downing, Mr. Crank, and Mr. Bean of Florida
Reported with an amendment, committed to the Committee of the Whole House on the State of the Union, and ordered to be printed
action.action-instruction: Strike out all after the enacting clause and insert the part printed in italic
For text of introduced bill, see copy of bill as introduced on February 6, 2025

form.official-title: To amend the CARES Act to remove a requirement on lessors to provide notice to vacate, and for other purposes.

section.text: This Act may be cited as the Respect State Housing Laws Act.
The CARES Act (Public Law 116–136) is amended, in section 4024 (15 U.S.C. 9058), by striking subsection (c).

endorsement.action-desc: Reported with an amendment, committed to the Committee of the Whole House on the State of the Union, and ordered to be printed
